g.text: Stack Frame Pointer Chaining: x86-64 Memory Layout & Traversal
push rbp ; Save caller's frame pointer
mov rbp, rsp ; Establish new frame base
sub rsp, 32 ; Allocate space for locals

text.tspan: push rbp ; Save caller's frame pointer
mov rbp, rsp ; Establish new frame base
sub rsp, 32 ; Allocate space for locals

g.text: leave ; mov rsp, rbp; pop rbp

text.tspan: leave ; mov rsp, rbp; pop rbp
